name: Churu Cat Treats Beef Recipe 4 Tubes
description: “ Churu churu ” means slurp slurp and that’s exactly what your cat will do with these creamy, lickable chicken treats. Made with real farm-raised chicken , each tube delivers protein-packed flavor cats can’t resist. Perfect as a snack, meal topper, or interactive treat straight from the tube, Churu also boosts hydration and supports overall feline health. Key Benefits: Grain-Free & Delicious: Creamy puree treats made with real chicken—no grains, no artificial ingredients Interactive Feeding: Lick straight from the tube, lap from a bowl, or mix into kibble or wet food Supports Hydration: 91% moisture helps keep cats hydrated and supports urinary health Nutritious Boost: Vitamin E supports immunity, and added Taurine supports heart and vision health Fun & Flexible: Serve as a treat, snack, or meal topper while strengthening your bond Available Pack Sizes: 1 pack of 4 tubes 6 packs of 4 tubes (24 tubes) Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.0% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.10% Moisture (max): 91.0% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6.0 kcal per tube Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
